title: Creamy Mushroom Sauce
excerpt: Ingredients 30 ml each, butter and olive oil 400 g portobellini mushrooms 375 ml cream salt, pepper, nutmeg and basil Method Heat the butter and oil in a large pan and fry the mushrooms until they are dry-fried, fragrant and browned. Add the cream and let the cream cook (stirring …
html:
Ingredients

  • 30 ml each, butter and olive oil
  • 400 g portobellini mushrooms
  • 375 ml cream
  • salt, pepper, nutmeg and basil

Method

Heat the butter and oil in a large pan and fry the mushrooms until they are dry-fried, fragrant and browned.

Add the cream and let the cream cook (stirring often) until it tastes right to you, reduced enough and thickened.

Season to taste with salt, pepper, nutmeg and basil and serve.

Makes about 4 – 6 servings alongside crispy strips of pork or chicken fillet.

Easy!

Tip: If you can get hold of those fancy tins of Chanterelles (French mushrooms) that we used on the programme, drain about three tins and use them instead of the fresh mushrooms.
